Metadata.Goal: 让 ai-runtime-control-composer 成为 AI runtime 持久化与控制一致性边界 owner，并将旧 writer 收敛为 support effect、projection 或 journal sink。
Metadata.Description: 补齐 ai-runtime-control-composer 真正替换旧 runtime 持久化与控制编排所缺的真实 adapter、recovery、effect lifecycle、concrete writer ownership 和持续 gap 扫描。

TaskSpace.name: adopt-ai-runtime-control-composer
TaskSpace.Description: 落地 ai-runtime-control-composer 替换路径

TaskGroup.name: 真实 session head 与 effect contract

Task.name: 补充真实 durable head contract
Task.Description: 定义 snapshot、conversation、transcript、mailbox、control signal、ingress、diagnostics 的 head descriptor、sequence 和 cohort metadata。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: contract 测试覆盖真实 head descriptor 数据结构
contract 仍只声明数据和副作用边界，不引入文件 IO 实现

Task.name: 补充真实 effect lifecycle contract
Task.Description: 定义 tool/MCP/bash/permission/questionnaire/provider completion 的 request/result/wait/recovery 数据结构。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: contract 测试覆盖 effect lifecycle 类型和 dirty/orphaned 分类输入
effect request 明确包含 effect id 与 idempotency key

TaskGroup.name: 真实 file-store support 与 scanner

Task.name: 实现真实 session head file-store adapter
Task.Description: 在 ai-file-store-logic / ai-runtime-control-support 中实现真实 session 文件到 durable head 的读写和 sequence 推导。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: file-store 测试覆盖真实 session 文件 head buffer 和 commit marker
shadow 阶段不破坏旧 runtime 文件格式

Task.name: 实现 recovery scanner
Task.Description: 扫描旧文件与 runtime-control 文件，产出 clean/pending/retryable/orphaned/dirty 分类和诊断。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: scanner 测试覆盖 clean、orphaned、dirty、pending
dirty session 不被静默标记为 clean

Task.name: RuntimeSnapshots shadow 写入 composer cohort
Task.Description: 在旧 snapshot save path 中同步生成 composer durable head buffer 和 cohort marker，旧文件仍为 source of truth。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 保存 snapshot 时写入 runtime-control head 和 marker
非 safepoint 时不写入 commit marker

Task.name: coordinator 与 effect lifecycle command emission
Task.Description: 将关键 tool/MCP/bash/permission/questionnaire/provider completion 事件发为 composer effect request/result command。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 真实 effect lifecycle 测试覆盖 request/result 配对
late completion 进入 effectResult 队列并优先消费

TaskGroup.name: load recovery gate 与历史 replay

Task.name: 接入 load/resume recovery classifier
Task.Description: 在 session load/resume path 使用 composer scanner 分类并阻止 dirty resume。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: dirty session load/resume 被拒绝或要求显式修复
clean session 仍可正常恢复

Task.name: 历史 incident replay 测试
Task.Description: 用真实 session fixture/replay 覆盖 unpaired tool output、duplicate humanInput、removed handler、multi-head mismatch、late completion stop。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 历史问题均有真实 replay 测试
重复工具循环类脏 tail 不会被静默恢复

Task.name: 扫描 composer 替换旧实现剩余 gap
Task.Description: 对照旧 RuntimeSnapshots、coordinator、orchestrator、conversation/transcript/mailbox/logs 职责清单，扫描 composer adoption 是否仍有 blocker。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: gap 报告写入 track reports 或 analysis
发现的新 blocker 已追加为本 track 任务

Task.name: 完成新增 gap 并重复扫描直到无 blocker
Task.Description: 实现 T5.1 发现的新增任务，并重复扫描，直到明确可用 composer 替换旧 runtime 实现。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 最终扫描确认没有替换 blocker
track 文档明确说明 composer 可替换范围和剩余非 blocker 风险

Task.name: 持久化 composer effect evidence
Task.Description: 为 effect request/result/wait/failed 生命周期添加 file-store evidence head，并让 recovery scanner 读取该 evidence 作为 effects 输入。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: effect lifecycle events 写入 runtime-control evidence 文件
recovery scanner 从 evidence 文件重建 effects 并分类 orphaned/pending/dirty

Task.name: 将 executor/orchestrator 真实副作用接入 composer lifecycle
Task.Description: 在 AiAgentExecutor、OrchestratorDriver 及 tool/MCP/bash/permission/questionnaire/provider completion 路径发出 composer lifecycle events。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: tool/MCP/bash request/result 均有 composer lifecycle evidence
permission/questionnaire/async completion wait 状态有 composer lifecycle evidence

Task.name: 实现 composer-owned checkpoint gate
Task.Description: 在显式 gate 下让 runtime save/load 依赖 composer-owned cohort commit 作为 checkpoint/evidence 一致性门禁，而不是仅 shadow 写 runtime-control metadata。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: gate 开启时 runtime save 必须在 safepoint 后通过 composer checkpoint command 生成 authoritative commit marker；旧 concrete repository writers 在过渡期仍可负责写入具体 runtime 文件
gate 开启时 load/resume 必须验证 composer commit marker

Task.name: 实现 ingress diagnostics replay scanner
Task.Description: 将 ingress.xnl 和 diagnostics.xnl 从 sequence-only head 扩展为可 replay 的 evidence 输入，用于恢复诊断和 gap 分析。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: scanner 可读取 ingress evidence 并参与 recovery report
scanner 可读取 diagnostics evidence 并参与 recovery report

Task.name: 定义 composer concrete checkpoint write API
Task.Description: 在 contract/composer 层定义 runtime concrete checkpoint write payload/result，并提供 file-store composer API 驱动具体 runtime 文件写入后再提交 checkpoint cohort。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: concrete checkpoint write 通过显式 effect handler 与 payload 表达，不由 RuntimeSnapshots 主流程直接调用多个 writer
composer 测试覆盖 concrete write effect 先执行、real heads 后 buffer、cohort 最后 commit

Task.name: 迁移 RuntimeSnapshots save 到 composer concrete writer
Task.Description: 将 actor transcript 初始化、conversation flush、runtime snapshot、derived indexes、manifest 写入收敛为 composer concrete checkpoint effect handler，由 composer 驱动执行并提交 checkpoint marker。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: saveAiAgentRuntimeSnapshot safepoint 后只调用 composer concrete checkpoint API，不再散落直接调用旧 concrete writers
runtime recovery、snapshot safepoint、executor evidence 相关测试继续通过

Task.name: 复扫 concrete writer 替换 gap
Task.Description: 扫描 RuntimeSnapshots、conversation repository、transcript、derived index writer 是否仍有主流程 ownership gap；更新 readiness report。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 报告确认具体文件写入由 composer checkpoint effect 驱动，旧 writer 仅作为 support 实现存在
reports 中记录 concrete writer ownership 复扫结果

Task.name: 记录 control engine 对齐设计
Task.Description: 将 runtime-control 引擎作为一致性 owner、旧 writer 作为 support effect、projection/journal 分域管理的设计写入 track，并记录当前偏差。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: design.md 说明 command/effect/head/cohort 的一致性边界，不把 composer 简化为直接替代每个 writer
reports 中记录 P6 后仍存在的 writer/evidence/recovery/projection/journal gap

Task.name: 消除 RuntimeSnapshots checkpoint 前旁路写入
Task.Description: 移除 safepoint 后、composer checkpoint 前的直接 conversation flush，保证 checkpoint concrete writes 只由 composer 驱动。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: saveAiAgentRuntimeSnapshot 在调用 runFileStoreAiRuntimeConcreteCheckpoint 前不直接写 conversation persistence
runtime snapshot safepoint 与 recovery 测试通过

Task.name: 将 concrete checkpoint handler support 化
Task.Description: 在 ai-runtime-control-support 中提供 file-store concrete checkpoint effect handler 构造，composer 组装 handler，不在 composer 内部手写旧 writer 编排。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: support 导出 runtime_concrete_checkpoint_write handler key 和 handler factory
composer concrete checkpoint API 使用 support handler factory 构造 effect handler

Task.name: 将 effect evidence 写入入口移到 composer facade
Task.Description: Executor 不再直接 import ai-file-store-logic 写 effect evidence，而是调用 composer/control facade 记录 lifecycle evidence。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: AiAgentExecutor 不再直接调用 appendRuntimeControlEffectEvidence
executor effect lifecycle evidence 测试通过

Task.name: 前置 recovery control gate 并归类 projection/journal
Task.Description: 在 load path 先执行 runtime-control recovery gate，再读取旧 snapshot support；同时明确 recovery derived indexes 是 projection refresh，ingress/diagnostics 是 journal sink。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: recoverAiAgentRuntime 在 repository.loadSnapshot 前执行 runtime-control gate
design/report 明确 projection refresh 与 journal sink 的一致性策略和后续迁移边界

Task.name: 定义不可降级升级记录
Task.Description: 在 file-store 层定义 runtime-control/upgrade.json，记录升级策略、checkpoint marker、head sequences 和升级时间。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: file-store 提供 upgrade marker read/write API
file-store 测试覆盖不可降级升级记录

Task.name: 实现 session 升级为 owned checkpoint
Task.Description: 在 composer 中提供 session 文件升级 API，读取真实 heads，提交 checkpoint cohort，写入不可降级 upgrade marker，并拒绝 dirty/orphaned 既有 checkpoint。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: composer 升级 API 为旧 session 写入 checkpoint marker 和 upgrade marker
composer integration 测试覆盖升级到 owned checkpoint

Task.name: 实现 composer dry-run/apply facade
Task.Description: 在 ai-runtime-control-composer 中提供只读 dry-run 分类 API 和先 dry-run 后写入的 apply API，输出 upgrade readiness、blockers、planned heads 和 verification。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: dry-run 只读取 upgrade marker、checkpoint marker、real heads 和 effect evidence，不写入 runtime-control 文件
apply 必须复用 dry-run 分类，dirty/orphaned/pending evidence 不可被覆盖成新 checkpoint marker

Task.name: 新增 session-upgrade CLI
Task.Description: 在 terminal CLI 中新增 session-upgrade 命令，支持 --session-dir、--dry-run、--apply，默认 dry-run，并以 JSON 输出结果。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 未提供 --apply 时 CLI 执行 dry-run 并输出 JSON
只有显式 --apply 才执行不可降级升级写入
--dry-run 与 --apply 同时出现时返回 usage error

Task.name: 验证单 session upgrade 入口
Task.Description: 补充 composer integration tests 和 CLI command tests，覆盖旧 session 可升级、orphaned evidence 拒绝和 already upgraded 输出。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: composer 测试覆盖 dry-run/apply/rejected/already-upgraded
CLI 测试覆盖 dry-run 默认、apply 和互斥参数错误

Task.name: 扩展 TUI runtime session upgrade SDK
Task.Description: 在 TUI runtime client contract 中暴露 session upgrade dry-run/apply API，并在 local-runtime 中复用 composer facade。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: TUI SDK 提供 upgradeDryRun 和 upgradeApply，不要求 UI 拼接 sessionDir
local-runtime 的 upgradeApply 调用同一套 composer session-upgrade 实现

Task.name: TUI 加载旧 session 前确认升级
Task.Description: 在 session list 点击加载或回车加载时先 dry-run；旧 session 可升级时弹出确认，确认后 apply，再导航恢复。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 缺 checkpoint 且 canUpgrade=true 时 TUI 弹出升级确认
dry-run 不可升级时 TUI 显示 blockers，不进入 session route

Task.name: 验证 TUI 升级交互
Task.Description: 补充 TUI system surface 测试，覆盖点击加载、确认升级、调用 apply、导航到 session。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: TUI 测试覆盖升级确认并调用 upgradeApply 后加载 session

Task.name: 记录 effect evidence 与 checkpoint safepoint 分域
Task.Description: 明确 runtime-control/effects.jsonl 是 append-only effect lifecycle evidence log；checkpoint recovery 必须结合 persisted cooperative inflight 判定 pending effect，而不是把所有 pending 都当作不可加载脏状态。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: design.md 明确 effect evidence log 与 checkpoint cohort 的分域，以及 pending effect 的两类恢复语义

Task.name: 在 composer 中建模 checkpointed pending inflight recovery
Task.Description: 在 ai-runtime-control-composer 中提供 pending effect 与 recovered inflight 的配对判定，并提供 interrupted inflight failed evidence 构造函数。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: composer 导出 decideAiRuntimePendingEffectsRecovery 与 buildAiRuntimeInterruptedInflightFailedEvidence
composer integration test 复现 checkpoint clean 但 bash effect 只有 request/waiting 的历史现场，并验证 matched inflight 可恢复、unmatched pending 不可恢复、failed evidence 闭合后 recovery clean

Task.name: RuntimeSnapshots 调用 composer pending recovery protocol
Task.Description: load/recovery gate 允许与 persisted inflight 对齐的 pending effect，并在恢复中断 tool/LLM 时通过 composer 构造 failed evidence 闭合 effect，再向 actor 注入恢复 completion。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: RuntimeSnapshots 不再私有维护 pending effect 配对与 failed evidence 构造逻辑，而是调用 composer API
真实历史 session smoke 复制现场验证 pending bash effect 可恢复并闭合，不污染原始 session

Task.name: 修正 effect evidence WAL 设计
Task.Description: 明确 effects.jsonl 是 runtime-control WAL，不是普通 diagnostics log；checkpoint recovery 只按 checkpoint 记录的 WAL prefix 分类，tail 留给 replay/diagnostics。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: design.md 记录 checkpoint logical cursor + WAL prefix recovery 规则
design.md 明确删除 writer-window drift guard 止血逻辑

Task.name: checkpoint/upgrade 记录 effect WAL sequence
Task.Description: 在 checkpoint commit 与 upgrade marker 中记录 effect WAL logical sequence，作为本 checkpoint 覆盖到的 runtime-control WAL 边界。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: checkpoint commit file 包含 effectEvidenceSequence
upgrade.json 包含 effectEvidenceSequence

Task.name: recovery gate 使用 WAL prefix
Task.Description: 恢复 gate 只读取 checkpoint sequence 覆盖的 effect evidence prefix 进行 clean/pending/orphaned/dirty 分类，checkpoint 后 tail 不阻塞恢复。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: checkpoint 后追加 pending effect 不会反向污染 checkpoint recovery
checkpoint prefix 内 orphaned/dirty evidence 仍会阻止恢复
已有 owned checkpoint 缺 effectEvidenceSequence 时，从 runtime_checkpoint result evidence 推断 checkpoint WAL prefix，不回退为全量 WAL
WAL prefix/tail 按事件 sequence 过滤，多字节 evidence 不参与定位语义

Task.name: 删除 drift guard 止血逻辑
Task.Description: 移除 runtime_checkpoint_effect_evidence_drift guard 和对应测试，替换为 WAL logical cursor/prefix 测试。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: composer checkpoint 不因 writer 窗口 WAL tail 追加而直接抛 drift
composer 与 runtime recovery sequence 测试通过

Task.name: 扫描并移除持久化 byte sequence 语义
Task.Description: 扫描 runtime-control 相关持久化，state 文件只能全量读写，append-only log 只能按事件 sequence 定位，不再使用文件大小或 byte offset 作为 domain sequence。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: effects.jsonl append 记录使用 {sequence,event} envelope
runtime reader 不接受旧 raw event JSONL 作为合法运行态输入
ingress/diagnostics head sequence 使用事件数，不使用 file size
runtime-control file-store API 不再导出 effectEvidenceOffset/readPrefixByOffset 一类 byte 定位 API

Task.name: 串行化 runtime-control WAL sequence 分配
Task.Description: 修复 effects.jsonl 并发 append 时通过读最大 sequence 推导下一个 sequence 导致重复 sequence 的根因，按 session WAL 串行分配逻辑事件序列。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试覆盖同一 session 并发 append 不产生重复 sequence
WAL sequence 仍是 envelope 逻辑事件序列，不引入 byte-position 语义
